my_thoughts: Remaking RM_02. Building after unmaking. But what am I building with? The comparison_contrast mechanism suggests structure, but structure for what? The student is identification_with_mortal_form—do they need structure or do they need to see they're already structured?
accumulated_insight: Building on T1: Initial observation: Student in vulnerable_emotional_resistance showing emotiona... Now seeing identification_with_mortal_form with comparison_contrast. Pattern emerging.
visible_response:
Every night in deep sleep this person vanishes, yet you are not terrified then.
You enjoy the rest. Only waking imagination calls it death and trembles.
